cit.basis: 25% Impuesto Sobre la Renta (Ley del ISR) on net taxable income; territorial system — foreign-source income is generally not taxed in Honduras.

solidarity_contribution.basis: Aportación solidaria: 5% on the portion of net taxable income exceeding HNL 1,000,000, in addition to the 25% CIT.

alternative_minimum.note: Alternative minimum tax of 1.5% on gross income for companies with gross revenue above HNL 1 billion; out of scope for this SME estimator.

cit.territorial_note: Honduras applies a territorial tax regime: only Honduran-source income is subject to ISR.

vat.note: ISV (Impuesto Sobre Ventas) at a standard 15% rate; 18% applies to alcoholic beverages and tobacco.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Alternative minimum tax, WHT, municipal taxes, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official SAR guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
